calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-02-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioners: Michael J. Susor and Thaai Walker, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Micah Royce Susor, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of a Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Makai Royce Susor.
Decree signed in open court.
